title: Cosmetics Store POS | Nova Point of Sale

headers.text: A More Dynamic Cosmetics StorePOS Solution
Increase Efficiency at Your Cosmetics & Beauty Store
Why Cosmetics Stores Love NOVA POS
Any business size. Any industry. Any request.
© Built by NOVA Point of Sale. Copyright and rights reserved
Get 3 Months Free with the NOVA Integrated Plan

paragraphs: Managing your cosmetics store and building your brand can be a challenge. That’s why we’ve developed a point of sale (POS) solution that not only streamlines your marketing and reporting, but also helps manage inventory levels and predicts demand for your most popular beauty products. NOVA POS offers a cosmetics store POS solution that simplifies your business, all from a single, easy-to-use platform.

When it comes to managing a cosmetics and beauty store, you need streamlined workflows and POS software that’s quick, easy to use and intuitive. That’s why we’ve developed a cosmetics store POS solution that gives you all the tools you need to run your store more efficiently—from enticing loyalty programs to real-time inventory management.

NOVA POS enables you to maximize sales with customizable pricing and commissions, quickly access key performance data like sales reports, and automate marketing with promotional announcements. And with a free trial of NOVA Integrated, you’ll enhance your beauty store POS solution by seamlessly adding payment processing.
Keep morale high and employees engaged with friendly competition, exciting rewards, and other employee motivation tools.
Set custom commission levels for each member of your team and effortlessly track performance.
Easily track beauty products and cosmetics samples, set low-stock alerts, and create automated purchase orders.
From announcing seasonal sales events to promoting new products, NOVA POS makes customer marketing a snap.
Access sales figures and other critical data, from employee performance reports to inventory and price lists, all from one easy-to-use dashboard.
With customizable pricing, let your staff enjoy more flexibility on promotions, giveaways, discounts, and more.

NOVA POS provides innovative solutions for modern cosmetics and beauty shops. Our unique cosmetics store POS software is easy to deploy and offers online customer support when you need it most. Enhance every aspect of your point of sale system, all from a fully integrated platform. We don’t just follow trends, we set them.
Access customizable reports for smarter strategies and growth
Nova Alerts keep you updated on sales, inventory, and more
From cosmetics samples to gift cards, spread the word…and brand awareness
Upsell with ease while offering layaways and pay-as-you-go plans

Ready to simplify your business, enhance customer experiences, and enjoy all the benefits of our medical spa POS system? Sign up with one of our preferred processing providers, and you’ll enjoy three free months of our Nova Integrated plan followed by a special promotional rate.

Ready to simplify your business, enhance customer experiences, and enjoy all the benefits of our medical spa POS system? Sign up with one of our preferred processing providers, and you’ll enjoy three free months of our Nova Integrated plan followed by a special promotional rate.

Any business size. Any industry. Any request. From mom-and-pop mall kiosks to multi-location stores, we work with businesses who want more: More innovation, more scalability, and more retail profitability, all in one place.
Sign up with our preferred payment processors and receive three months of free service, followed by a promotional rate.
“To Whom It May Concern,

Let me take a moment,out of my very busy day to review my experience of Sebastian Chaviano..Sebastian is a dream customer service/technical support person. He’s extremely professional and nano-second responsive in every interaction. We’ve even worked on a chronic issue where I learned that his perseverance and patience are also outstanding. Over my 33 years of working in Silicon Valley, I’ve rarely met someone as easy with which to work as Sebastian.

That said, over the past 3 months of getting to know Nova POS, for the first time, I’ve also worked with Frank, Jeffrey, Jose, & Tomer – all provide the immediate service and answers I’ve required. You have a great team at Nova POS. Keep up the good work.”
